thesis: Show HN drove ~100 visitors but only 1 user played (9 rounds). Root cause: high bounce rate — people landed, didn't understand the game or weren't compelled to try. No intervention yet. Prediction: without a change, next week's DB metrics stay flat (rounds7d < 20, users7d < 3) even if GA traffic holds.

message: Bounce fix: snippet first, challenge headline
thesis: Layout reorder puts code snippet above the fold immediately. Prediction: rounds7d moves from 9 → 30+ and users7d from 1 → 5+ within 7 days. If not, bounce is driven by content difficulty or load time, not layout.
